records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, look at all this debris.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, look at all this debris.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, look at all this debris.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Looks like there was an explosion here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Looks like there was an explosion here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Looks like there was an explosion here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The traces show that the explosives were used from inside the facility, not outside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The traces show that the explosives were used from inside the facility, not outside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The traces show that the explosives were used from inside the facility, not outside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why would they blow it up from here? There seems to be a lot of expensive equipment here too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why would they blow it up from here? There seems to be a lot of expensive equipment here too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why would they blow it up from here? There seems to be a lot of expensive equipment here too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They were probably planning on blowing up the whole facility as a precaution. Tech leaks are a serious matter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They were probably planning on blowing up the whole facility as a precaution. Tech leaks are a serious matter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They were probably planning on blowing up the whole facility as a precaution. Tech leaks are a serious matter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But if the terminal's fine, doesn't that mean there wasn't enough firepower?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But if the terminal's fine, doesn't that mean there wasn't enough firepower?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But if the terminal's fine, doesn't that mean there wasn't enough firepower?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Either they failed to erase the records, or they were trying to eliminate something else besides the facility.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Either they failed to erase the records, or they were trying to eliminate something else besides the facility.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Either they failed to erase the records, or they were trying to eliminate something else besides the facility.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the dust scattered here are traces of carbonized Eternium.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the dust scattered here are traces of carbonized Eternium.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the dust scattered here are traces of carbonized Eternium.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Typically, there's only one reason why you would use such expensive material in an explosive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Typically, there's only one reason why you would use such expensive material in an explosive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Typically, there's only one reason why you would use such expensive material in an explosive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well... it wouldn't be surprising for a high-tier C.O. to just pop out at this depth.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well... it wouldn't be surprising for a high-tier C.O. to just pop out at this depth.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well... it wouldn't be surprising for a high-tier C.O. to just pop out at this depth.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We should take care. That high-tier C.O. might still be around.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We should take care. That high-tier C.O. might still be around.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We should take care. That high-tier C.O. might still be around.

records.m_Talk_ENG: More care ain't gonna help us. This place is already crawling with C.O.s waking up from their hibernation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: More care ain't gonna help us. This place is already crawling with C.O.s waking up from their hibernation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: More care ain't gonna help us. This place is already crawling with C.O.s waking up from their hibernation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not good to stay here for long. Let's move.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not good to stay here for long. Let's move.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not good to stay here for long. Let's move.
